name: Instant Food Fight
description: Instant Food Fight was a digital version of Food Fight who was exclusive to the Tablet Starter Pack of Skylanders: Trap Team.
biography: Instant Food Fight is a digital Life element Skylander who debuted in the Tablet version of Skylanders: Trap Team. He was provided as a digital-only character to allow players immediate access to gameplay without needing to place a physical figure on a portal, which was ideal for the mobile nature of tablet gaming.
personality: Determined and pugnacious, Instant Food Fight shares the personality of the original Food Fight, using his produce-based weaponry with zeal and energy.

story.content: Exclusive to the tablet version of Skylanders: Trap Team, this digital hero was provided to ensure players could play the game instantly upon download, bypassing the requirement for a physical starter pack.

trivia: Loading Instant Food Fight on the console versions of Skylanders: Trap Team will hang on the element indefinitely.
In both Skylanders: SuperChargers and Skylanders: Imaginators he scans in as 'Food Fight Special' and can be added to the collection as a separate Skylander.
His internal name used in game files is 'Virtual Food Fight'.
gameplay: Instant Food Fight plays identically to the standard Food Fight, utilizing a tomato launcher and artichoke-based traps to control the battlefield.

basic.name: Tomato Launcher
basic.content: Shoot high-velocity tomatoes at enemies from a handheld launcher.

basic.name: Blooms of Doom
basic.content: Place artichoke traps that burst when enemies get close.

basic_upgrades.name: Extra-Ripe Tomatoes
basic_upgrades.content: Tomatoes deal more damage upon impact.

soulgems.name: Special Squash
soulgems.content: A devastating squash attack that clears the surrounding area.

abilities.name: Heavy Harvest
abilities.content: Increased fire rate for the tomato launcher.
